rendered_text:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
umask 077
# === SIGPIPE + serial-heartbeat setup (#607, incident #491) ===
# fd 3 = the metadata runner's pipe. Only tiny newline-terminated
# heartbeats ever go there; raw workload output never does (the
# runner's bounded line scanner kills the script on giant lines).
# fd 3 is inherited by workload children: nothing legitimately writes
# to it, and a stray giant `>&3` write now fails LOUDLY (child SIGPIPE
# -> rc!=0 -> EXIT trap -> phase=failed + shutdown), never a zombie.
exec 3>&1
# A HANDLER (not ignore): the parent shell survives a closed runner
# pipe as a normal write error (rc=1 -> set -e -> EXIT trap fires with
# rc!=0), while children keep DEFAULT SIGPIPE (SIG_IGN would be
# inherited across exec and break producer|head pipelines under
# pipefail in workload drivers).
trap ':' PIPE
_eps_phase() { curl -fsS -X PUT -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" --data "$1" "http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/guest-attributes/eps/phase" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; { echo "[phase=$1] startup-script $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"; } 2>/dev/null || true; { echo "[startup-script] phase=$1" >&3; } 2>/dev/null || true; }
trap 'rc=$?; set +e; if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ]; then { echo "[startup-script] FAILED rc=$rc — powering off to bound billing"; } 2>/dev/null || true; _eps_phase failed; if [ -n "${EPS_LOG_PATH:-}" ]; then { tail -n 40 "$EPS_LOG_PATH" 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-2000 >&3; } 2>/dev/null || true; fi; shutdown -h now; fi' EXIT
_eps_phase startup
export HOME="${HOME:-/root}"

# === GCE startup-script (wf-issue-137) ===
export EPS_ISSUE=137
export EPS_ATTEMPT_ID=att-fixed-001
export WORKLOAD_ROOT=/workspace/wf-issue-137
export EPS_SENTINEL_PATH=/workspace/wf-issue-137/eval_results/issue_137/att-fixed-001/.completion-sentinel.json

# === Output redirect (#607): never stream workload output through the
# metadata runner (bufio.Scanner token-too-long kill, incident #491) ===
export EPS_LOG_PATH=/workspace/logs/issue-137.log
mkdir -p /workspace/logs
{ echo "[startup-script] redirecting all further output to $EPS_LOG_PATH"; } 2>/dev/null || true
exec >>"$EPS_LOG_PATH" 2>&1
echo "=== startup-script begin issue=137 attempt=$EPS_ATTEMPT_ID $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) ==="
# Defense in depth: no progress bars even into the log file (tqdm
# checks TQDM_DISABLE; vLLM + huggingface_hub bars are tqdm-based).
export TQDM_DISABLE=1
# === /output redirect (#607) ===

# === Secrets from instance metadata ===
HF_TOKEN=$(curl -fsS -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" "http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/attributes/HF_TOKEN" 2>/dev/null || true); export HF_TOKEN
WANDB_API_KEY=$(curl -fsS -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" "http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/attributes/WANDB_API_KEY" 2>/dev/null || true); export WANDB_API_KEY
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=$(curl -fsS -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" "http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/attributes/ANTHROPIC_API_KEY" 2>/dev/null || true); export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
OPENAI_API_KEY=$(curl -fsS -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" "http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/attributes/OPENAI_API_KEY" 2>/dev/null || true); export OPENAI_API_KEY
EPM_PERSIST_ADAPTER_HF_REPO=$(curl -fsS -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" "http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/attributes/EPM_PERSIST_ADAPTER_HF_REPO" 2>/dev/null || true); export EPM_PERSIST_ADAPTER_HF_REPO
EPM_PERSIST_ADAPTER_SUBFOLDER=$(curl -fsS -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" "http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/attributes/EPM_PERSIST_ADAPTER_SUBFOLDER" 2>/dev/null || true); export EPM_PERSIST_ADAPTER_SUBFOLDER
EPM_HF_STORAGE_SOFT_CEILING_TB=$(curl -fsS -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" "http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/attributes/EPM_HF_STORAGE_SOFT_CEILING_TB" 2>/dev/null || true); export EPM_HF_STORAGE_SOFT_CEILING_TB
EPM_HF_OVERFLOW_ROUTING=$(curl -fsS -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" "http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/attributes/EPM_HF_OVERFLOW_ROUTING" 2>/dev/null || true); export EPM_HF_OVERFLOW_ROUTING
EPM_HF_STORAGE_CHECK=$(curl -fsS -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" "http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/attributes/EPM_HF_STORAGE_CHECK" 2>/dev/null || true); export EPM_HF_STORAGE_CHECK
EPM_HF_STORAGE_CACHE_TTL_S=$(curl -fsS -H "Metadata-Flavor: Google" "http://metadata.google.internal/computeMetadata/v1/instance/attributes/EPM_HF_STORAGE_CACHE_TTL_S" 2>/dev/null || true); export EPM_HF_STORAGE_CACHE_TTL_S

# === In-VM preflight: required workload secrets ===
[ -n "${HF_TOKEN:-}" ] || { echo "[FAIL] HF_TOKEN missing from instance metadata"; exit 78; }
[ -n "${WANDB_API_KEY:-}" ] || { echo "[FAIL] WANDB_API_KEY missing from instance metadata"; exit 78; }

# === Repo clone / pull (idempotent) ===
mkdir -p "$WORKLOAD_ROOT"
if [ ! -d "$WORKLOAD_ROOT/.git" ]; then
  git clone --depth 1 --branch main https://github.com/your-github-username/your-project.git "$WORKLOAD_ROOT"
else
  git -C "$WORKLOAD_ROOT" fetch --depth 1 origin main
  git -C "$WORKLOAD_ROOT" checkout main
  git -C "$WORKLOAD_ROOT" reset --hard origin/main
fi

# === Install uv if missing + sync env ===
if ! command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
  export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
fi
cd "$WORKLOAD_ROOT"
uv sync --frozen --python 3.11

# === HF cache + sentinel dir ===
export HF_HOME="$WORKLOAD_ROOT/.cache/huggingface"
mkdir -p "$HF_HOME"
mkdir -p /workspace/wf-issue-137/eval_results/issue_137/att-fixed-001

# === Run the workload (Hydra args = the spec's hydra_args) ===
# A non-zero exit propagates (set -e) → the EXIT trap publishes
# phase=failed + powers off → poll reads dead.
_eps_phase workload
uv run python scripts/train.py condition=c1_evil_wrong_em seed=42

# === Completion sentinel (workload exited cleanly) ===
# The artifact verifier reads this back via list_repo_files / scp.
# Phase=done + issue=<N> is the schema artifacts.py validates.
cat > /workspace/wf-issue-137/eval_results/issue_137/att-fixed-001/.completion-sentinel.json <<EOF
{"phase":"done","issue":137,"attempt_id":"att-fixed-001"}
EOF
_eps_phase done
